BDD Style Test Cases
Feature: Gmail Compose Email

column2: Scenario
Successfully Send Email
column3:
Given user is logged into Gmail
When user clicks on Compose
And enters a valid recipient email
And enters subject "Incubyte"
And enters body "QA test for Incubyte"
And clicks Send
Then the email should be sent successfully
And should appear in Sent folder

column2: Send Email Without Recipient
column3:
Given user is logged into Gmail
When user clicks Compose
And enters subject "Incubyte"
And enters body "QA test for Incubyte"
And clicks Send
Then a recipient required validation message should be displayed

column2: Invalid Recipient Email
column3:
Given user is logged into Gmail
When user clicks Compose
And enters recipient email "abc@"
And enters subject "Incubyte"
And enters body "QA test for Incubyte"
And clicks Send
Then an invalid email address error should be displayed

column2: Send Email Without Subject
column3:
Given user is logged into Gmail
When user clicks Compose
And enters a valid recipient email
And enters body "QA test for Incubyte"
And clicks Send
Then Gmail should display a warning about missing subject

column2: Send Email Without Internet
column3:
Given user is logged into Gmail
And internet connection is disconnected
When user composes an email
And clicks Send
Then email should not be sent immediately
And user should receive an appropriate notification
